# sakura_monitoring_suite_trace_storage (Data Source)

Get information about an existing Monitoring Suite Trace Storage.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "sakura_monitoring_suite_trace_storage" "foobar" {
  name = "foobar"
  # or
  # id = "trace-storage-resource-id"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `id` (String) The ID of the Monitoring Suite Trace Storage.
- `name` (String) The name of the Monitoring Suite Trace Storage.

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (String) The creation timestamp of the Monitoring Suite Trace Storage
- `description` (String) The description of the Monitoring Suite Trace Storage.
- `endpoints` (Attributes) The endpoints of the Trace Storage. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--endpoints))
- `project_id` (String) The project ID of the Trace Storage.
- `resource_id` (String) The resource ID of the Trace Storage.
- `retention_period_days` (Number) The retention period days of the Trace Storage.

<a id="nestedatt--endpoints"></a>
### Nested Schema for `endpoints`

Read-Only:

- `ingester` (Attributes) The ingester endpoint for the Trace Storage. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--endpoints--ingester))

<a id="nestedatt--endpoints--ingester"></a>
### Nested Schema for `endpoints.ingester`

Read-Only:

- `address` (String) The ingester address for the Trace Storage.
- `insecure` (Boolean) The flag to indicate whether the ingester uses insecure connection.
